decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive, efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing powerful low-cost creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, along with spells like Burst Lightning and Opt for removal and card advantage, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and utility cards like Multiversal Passage and Prismari Charm add versatility and flexibility to the deck, giving the player options to adapt to different situations and outmaneuver their opponent.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on utilizing a variety of cheap removal spells and counter magic to control the opponent's threats while slowly gaining card advantage with draw spells. It aims to stall the game with cards like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental, while using cards like Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm to deal with early threats. Eventually, the deck looks to finish off the opponent with cards like Sunderflock and Traumatic Critique, while continuing to disrupt their game plan with Impractical Joke and Spell Pierce.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on utilizing a combination of card advantage, removal spells, and counterspells to establish board control and outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to control the game through a mix of card draw with Consult the Star Charts and Tablet of Discovery, removal with Burst Lightning and Sear, and disruption with Prismari Charm and Bounce Off. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to slowly grind out incremental advantages until a win condition can be established with cards like Sanar, Unfinished Genius and Colorstorm Stallion.

The main idea behind this deck is to quickly build a board presence with efficient creatures and use combat tricks to overwhelm the opponent. By playing aggressively and efficiently utilizing the mana ramp provided by cards like Llanowar Elves and Brightglass Gearhulk, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and maintain that pressure throughout the game. Cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker help to push through damage, while Gene Pollinator and Nurturing Pixie provide support and synergy within the deck. The goal is to win through quick and relentless aggression.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using various spells and abilities to outmaneuver and outsmart the opponent. The deck focuses on utilizing Izzet cards and powerful control spells like Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using a combination of card draw, removal, and resource management, the deck aims to eventually overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through careful planning and strategic decision-making. The deck also includes cards like Stock Up and Tablet of Discovery to ensure consistency and card advantage throughout the match.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Spell Snare, Burst Lightning, and Prismari Charm, the player can disrupt their opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage with Opt, Get Out, and Traumatic Critique. The creatures in the deck, such as Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental, provide additional ways to control the board and pressure the opponent. With a mix of tempo plays and late-game power, this deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast its opponent in the long game.

This deck focuses on using counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By utilizing cards such as Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Prismari Charm for card selection and advantage, as well as utilizing creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock for board control, the deck aims to stall the game long enough to win with powerful finishers like Colorstorm Stallion and Hearth Elemental. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage and tempo to secure victory.

The main focus of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a strong early game presence and efficient creature removal. By utilizing cards like Practiced Offense and Gene Pollinator, the deck aims to quickly build a threatening board state while also controlling the opponent's board with cards like Seam Rip. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Brightglass Gearhulk further strengthens the deck's ability to apply pressure and maintain board control. Additionally, the mana base of the deck ensures consistency and enables fast, aggressive plays.

The main idea of this Izzet Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan while slowly building up card advantage and tempo. The deck aims to efficiently counter and remove threats using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and bounce effects. By controlling the board and manipulating the opponent's resources, the deck can outlast the opponent and eventually win through either card advantage or a well-timed finisher. The deck features a mix of cheap interaction, card draw, and versatile threats to handle a variety of matchups.

The deck focuses on combining powerful creatures from the graveyard with spells that manipulate the opponent's hand and board state. Using cards like Emeritus of Ideation and Bitter Triumph to fill the graveyard, while using Duress and Deceit to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Requiting Hex and Superior Spider-Man provide reanimation targets, while Stock Up and Restless Reef help draw into key pieces. Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery provide additional threats, while Shoot the Sheriff and Day of Black Sun offer removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive spells.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. By managing the opponent's threats and resources while also drawing cards and generating value, the deck aims to outlast and outsmart the opponent. The inclusion of versatile spells like Prismari Charm and Jeskai Revelation allows for flexibility in different situations, while the mana base provides access to a variety of colors for maximum effectiveness. Overall, the deck focuses on maintaining control of the game until it can secure a win condition.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early defense, while Impractical Joke and Traumatic Critique disrupt the opponent's strategy. Prismari Charm offers versatility with its multiple modes, while Opt and Sleight of Hand help dig for key cards. Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage provide mana fixing, while Burst Lightning and Winternight Stories offer additional removal options. Overall, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and protect its game plan until it can secure a win.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and efficient army of creatures. By utilizing cards like Practiced Offense, Surrak, Elusive Hunter, and Brightglass Gearhulk, the deck aims to deal a significant amount of damage quickly. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to ramp up mana production and ensure a smooth curve of powerful creatures. The key strategy revolves around building a wide board presence and applying pressure to the opponent while maintaining card advantage and board control.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing board presence and dealing direct damage to the opponent. By utilizing cheap spells and creatures with abilities that can trigger multiple times, the aim is to overwhelm the opponent before they can set up their own game plan. Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off provide control elements, while cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Burst Lightning allow for direct damage. The deck also includes cards like Eddymurk Crab and Multiversal Passage for added utility and versatility in different situations. The goal is to maintain pressure and tempo throughout the game until victory is achieved.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw to control the game and slow down the opponent's strategy. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide board control, while Prismari Charm, Opt, and Sleight of Hand offer card advantage and flexibility. Impractical Joke and Get Out disrupt the opponent's plans, while Hearth Elemental serves as a win condition. The deck aims to outlast the opponent by disrupting their plays and drawing into key cards to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through counterspells, card draw, and removal while utilizing a mix of creatures and spells to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It combines the card advantage and flexibility of blue with the burn and removal spells of red to create a versatile and adaptable control deck. By managing resources effectively and using a combination of reactive and proactive cards, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver opponents in order to secure victory.
